headline: Tapestry (TPR) Stock Looks Overvalued After Its 292% Five Year Run
summary: Tapestry stock has delivered a very strong 5 year run, yet the valuation picture is now less straightforward. The Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate suggests the shares are roughly in line with fair value, while earnings based multiples point to a richer price and the broader checks lean expensive. Tapestry has returned about 292% over 5 years, which puts extra focus on whether the current share price already reflects much of the progress investors have been paying...

headline: Tapestry (TPR) Stock Loses Its Place In Several Major Russell Indices
summary: Tapestry (NYSE:TPR) has been removed from several major Russell indices, including the Russell 1000 Value, 2500, and 3000 Value benchmarks. The index changes affect portfolios that track these benchmarks and may influence how some institutional and passive investors gain exposure to Tapestry. The move alters Tapestry’s role within a widely followed group of value and broad market indices that many investors use as reference points. Tapestry, trading on the NYSE under ticker TPR, now sits...
